_comment: Operator-local external MCP servers consumed by VIPER's MCP client (their output is gate-filtered before it can become submittable). Copy to mcp_servers.json (gitignored) and edit. VIPER's client is stdio; for SSE/HTTP servers (e.g. an external Burp Suite MCP) use a stdio<->SSE bridge as below, or run: viper.py mcp connect <name> <sse-url> <token>

burp._about: An external Burp Suite MCP extension exposing an SSE endpoint at http://127.0.0.1:9876/. Load the extension in Burp Pro first, copy its session token, and replace <token>. mcp-remote bridges VIPER's stdio client to the SSE endpoint.

example-stdio._about: Any spec-compliant stdio MCP server is consumed directly (no bridge).
